General.Name: Xinji Shaxi Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Xinji Shaxi Group Co., Ltd, an investment holding company, operates and manages hospitality supplies and home furnishing shopping malls in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in two segments, Property Leasing and Property Management Services. It sells hospitality and home furnishing products through online shopping mall; and provides management services to shopping malls. The company also offers property management services to tenants and apartment properties. In addition, it manages owned/leased portfolio shopping mall, subleasing apartments, property management projects, and online shopping mall; and provides exhibition management services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
